goal: Deliver the demo feature end-to-end across two milestones (以终为始: this whole goal, not one milestone).

milestones.objective: Establish the foundational module and its public contracts.
milestones.acceptance_bar: Foundation module builds, its unit tests pass, and its contracts are documented.

milestones.objective: Build the user-facing feature on top of the foundation.
milestones.acceptance_bar: The feature works end-to-end against the signed acceptance checklist.
